---
title: "Analysis of fragmented river systems"
author: "Damiano Baldan"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: rmdformats::downcute
knit: (function(input_file, encoding) {
  out_dir <- 'docs';
  rmarkdown::render(input_file,
 encoding=encoding,
 output_file=file.path(dirname(input_file), out_dir, 'index.html'))})
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Content

<a href="1_data_processing.html">1_data_processing.html</a>

<a href="2_river_networks.html">2_river_networks.html</a>

# some other Content

some content

some other content 

some additional content
